title: stellaria media proles neglecta
intro: Stellaria media proles neglecta, commonly known as creeping chickweed or common chickweed, is a type of flowering plant in the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce pain, and prevent infections. The plant's medicinal properties also provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Creeping chickweed is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
